name: claude-hud-plus
description: 增强型 Claude Code 状态栏 HUD：显示 API 路由真实模型并支持长会话诊断

scripts.test:coverage: npm run build && c8 --reporter=text --reporter=lcov node scripts/run-tests.mjs
scripts.test:stdin: npm run build && echo '{"model":{"display_name":"Opus"},"context_window":{"current_usage":{"input_tokens":45000},"context_window_size":200000},"transcript_path":"/tmp/test.jsonl"}' | node dist/index.js

author: Dec27-Lee (based on claude-hud by Jarrod Watts)
